description:
# CLI Package & Polish

Create a standalone CLI that runs the setup pipeline without requiring a running server. Polish the HTML report and end-to-end flow.

## Phases
1. Standalone setup CLI package
2. HTML report refinements
3. Update /setuplab skill and docs
title: [Epic] CLI Package & Polish
